name: Huxen Corporation
summary: Huxen Corporation provides office products in Taiwan. The company offers photocopiers, multifunctional service machines, laser printers, digital printing machines, and 3D printing, as well as network communication products, including telephone exchange, peripheral goods, firewall commodity, and Internet goods. It also provides software systems comprising solutions, app application, and transaction machine cloud systems; video systems, such as commercial projectors and video conferencing systems; cloud systems; and air purifiers. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
